function.message: Completed the next inbox task: OCR/frontmatter migration was applied to all 8 explicitly listed finance records, preserving each original note body, and the inbox item was removed.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read nested AGENTS/workflow/schema docs before task work, used explicit inbox file list as exact scope, preserved original bodies during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly listed 8 finance files to run through OCR. Each of those 8 files was read and then updated with schema-required YAML frontmatter (invoice/bill fields and lines) derived from visible note content, with body preserved verbatim per migration workflow. After all items were processed, the inbox file was deleted as required by inbox workflows.
